speaker: Daiana Fernández Molero
text: What Milei is implementing is not anarcho-capitalism but a 'capitalism of rules' that breaks crony capitalism through antitrust, free trade, and competition — and Argentine voters rewarded this in the midterms despite painful cuts.
context: Cited that cell phones in Argentina were unaffordable due to closed economy; midterm support after budget cuts.

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
